name: When Fewer Layers Break More Chains: Layer Pruning Harms Test-Time Scaling in LLMs

description: arXiv:2510.22228v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Layer pruning has emerged as a widely adopted technique for improving the efficiency of large language models (LLMs). Although existing methods demonstrate strong performance retention on general knowledge tasks, their effect on long-chain reasoning, a more brittle yet crucial capability, remains largely unexplored. In this work, we stud...
author: Keyu Wang, Tian Lyu, Guinan Su, Lu Yin, Marco Canini, Jonas Geiping, Shiwei Liu
